conditionsOfAccess: Restricted. Raw reads not publicly available; communicated directly to participants. Owned by the A-Fish-DNA-Scan and ME-BARCODE group, University of Minho.
description: Raw 12S, 16S and COI fish metabarcoding reads from Lisbon Aquarium samples. Currently unpublished; communicated directly to challenge participants. Owned by the A-Fish-DNA-Scan and ME-BARCODE group at the University of Minho. Used as input to the MARCO-BOLO Data Analysis Challenge.
name: 12S, 16S and COI fish metabarcoding from Lisbon aquarium samples (raw reads)
